sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational Q14 orthonormal 8-point DCT coefficient ROM; transposes the matrix for IDCT mode.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_mac8: Combinational signed 8-term multiply-accumulate datapath for one transform output row.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_sat: Combinational fixed-point rounding, Q14 scaling, and signed saturation to output width.
